data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Instagram's UI maintains consistency across devices, fostering usability and predictability.
data.technical_spec: Cross-platform UI frameworks, Material Design guidelines.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visual appeal enhances the perceived usability of the app, encouraging usage and engagement.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes the size and positioning of interactive elements for faster accessibility.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces decision-making time by minimizing menu options to essential features.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Achieves high-speed interactions with immediate responses to user inputs.
